EndpointAddress.description: The IoT managed integrations dedicated, custom endpoint for the device to route traffic through.

configurationStatus.description: Provides the status of the default encryption configuration for an Amazon Web Services account.

encryptionType.description: The type of encryption used for the encryption configuration.

kmsKeyArn.description: The Key Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS KMS key used for KMS encryption if you use KMS_BASED_ENCRYPTION.

HubTokenTimerExpirySettingInSeconds.description: A user-defined integer value that represents the hub token timer expiry setting in seconds.

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the hub configuration was updated.

Items.description: The list of account associations that match the specified criteria.

NextToken.description: A token used for pagination of results when there are more account associations than can be returned in a single response.
A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.

ConnectorDestinationList.description: The list of connector destinations that match the specified criteria.

NextToken.description: A token used for pagination of results when there are more connector destinations than can be returned in a single response.
A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.
A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.

Items.description: The list of device discovery jobs that match the specified criteria.

NextToken.description: A token used for pagination of results when there are more device discovery jobs than can be returned in a single response.

EventLogConfigurationList.description: A list of each event log configuration and pertinent information.

NextToken.description: A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.

Items.description: The list of managed thing associations that match the specified criteria, including the managed thing ID and account association ID for each association.

NextToken.description: A token used for pagination of results when there are more account associations than can be returned in a single response.
A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.
A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.

Items.description: The list of the over-the-air (OTA) task configurations.

NextToken.description: A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.

Tasks.description: A list of all of the over-the-air (OTA) tasks.

NextToken.description: A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.
A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.

AccountAssociationId.description: The unique identifier of the retrieved account association.

AssociationState.description: The current status state for the account association.

ErrorMessage.description: The error message explaining the current account association error.

ConnectorDestinationId.description: The identifier of the connector destination associated with this account association.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the account association.

OAuthAuthorizationUrl.description: Third party IoT platform OAuth authorization server URL backed with all the required parameters to perform end-user authentication.

Tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the account association.

Name.description: The display name of the C2C connector.

EndpointConfig.description: The configuration details for the cloud connector endpoint, including connection parameters and authentication requirements.

EndpointType.description: The type of endpoint used for the cloud connector, which defines how the connector communicates with external services.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the cloud connector.

Name.description: The display name of the connector destination.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the connector destination.

AuthType.description: The authentication type used for the connector destination, which determines how credentials and access are managed.

AuthConfig.description: The authentication configuration details for the connector destination, including OAuth settings and other authentication parameters.

SecretsManager.description: The AWS Secrets Manager configuration used to securely store and manage sensitive information for the connector destination.

OAuthCompleteRedirectUrl.description: The URL where users are redirected after completing the OAuth authorization process for the connector destination.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the credential locker.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the credential locker requset occurred.

Tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the credential locker.

DeliveryDestinationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the customer-managed destination.

DeliveryDestinationType.description: The destination type for the customer-managed destination.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the delivery destination role.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the destination creation requset occurred.

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the destination update requset occurred.

Tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the customer-managed destination.

Id.description: The id of the device discovery job request.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the device discovery job request.

DiscoveryType.description: The discovery type supporting the type of device to be discovered in the device discovery job request.

Status.description: The status of the device discovery job request.

StartedAt.description: The timestamp value for the start time of the device discovery.

ControllerId.description: The id of the end-user's IoT hub.

ConnectorAssociationId.description: The ID tracking the current discovery process for one connector association.

AccountAssociationId.description: The identifier of the account association used for the device discovery.

FinishedAt.description: The timestamp value for the completion time of the device discovery.

Tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the device discovery request.

Id.description: The identifier of the event log configuration.

ResourceType.description: The type of resource for the event log configuration.

ResourceId.description: The identifier of the resource for the event log configuration.

EventLogLevel.description: The logging level for the event log configuration.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the managed thing.

Owner.description: Owner of the device, usually an indication of whom the device belongs to. This value should not contain personal identifiable information.

CredentialLockerId.description: The identifier of the credential locker for the managed thing.

Role.description: The type of device used. This will be the Amazon Web Services hub controller, cloud device, or IoT device.

ProvisioningStatus.description: The provisioning status of the device in the provisioning workflow for onboarding to IoT managed integrations.

Name.description: The name of the managed thing representing the physical device.

UniversalProductCode.description: The universal product code (UPC) of the device model. The UPC is typically used in the United States of America and Canada.

InternationalArticleNumber.description: The unique 13 digit number that identifies the managed thing.

ConnectorPolicyId.description:
The id of the connector policy.

This parameter is used for cloud-to-cloud devices only.

ConnectorDestinationId.description: The identifier of the connector destination associated with this managed thing.

ConnectorDeviceId.description:
The third-party device id as defined by the connector. This device id must not contain personal identifiable information (PII).

This parameter is used for cloud-to-cloud devices only.

DeviceSpecificKey.description:
A Zwave device-specific key used during device activation.

This parameter is used for Zwave devices only.

MacAddress.description:
The media access control (MAC) address for the device represented by the managed thing.

This parameter is used for Zigbee devices only.

ParentControllerId.description: Id of the controller device used for the discovery job.

Classification.description: The classification of the managed thing such as light bulb or thermostat.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the device creation request occurred.

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the managed thing was last updated at.

ActivatedAt.description: The timestampe value of when the device was activated.

HubNetworkMode.description: The network mode for the hub-connected device.

Tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the managed thing.

Capabilities.description: The capabilities of the device such as light bulb.

CapabilityReport.description: A report of the capabilities for the managed thing.

CertificatePem.description: The PEM-encoded certificate for the managed thing.

Connected.description: The connectivity status for a managed thing.

Timestamp.description: The timestamp value of when the connectivity status for a managed thing was last taken.

DisconnectReason.description: The reason for the connectivity disconnect with the managed thing.

EventType.description: The type of event triggering a device notification to the customer-managed destination.

DestinationName.description: The name of the destination for the notification configuration.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the notification configuration was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the notification configuration was last updated.

Tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the notification configuration.

TaskArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the over-the-air (OTA) task

S3Url.description: The URL to the Amazon S3 bucket where the over-the-air (OTA) task is stored.

Protocol.description: The connection protocol the over-the-air (OTA) task uses to update the device.

OtaType.description: The frequency type for the over-the-air (OTA) task.

OtaTargetQueryString.description: The query string to add things to the thing group.

OtaMechanism.description: The deployment mechanism for the over-the-air (OTA) task.

Target.description: The device targeted for the over-the-air (OTA) task.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the over-the-air (OTA) task was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the over-the-air (OTA) task was last updated at.

TaskConfigurationId.description: The identifier for the over-the-air (OTA) task configuration.

TaskProcessingDetails.description: The processing details of all over-the-air (OTA) tasks.

Tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the over-the-air (OTA) task.

Name.description: The name of the over-the-air (OTA) task configuration.

PushConfig.description: Describes the type of configuration used for the over-the-air (OTA) task.

Description.description: A description of the over-the-air (OTA) task configuration.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp value of when the over-the-air (OTA) task configuration was created at.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the provisioning template used in the provisioning profile.

ProvisioningType.description: The type of provisioning workflow the device uses for onboarding to IoT managed integrations.

Tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the provisioning profile.

RuntimeLogConfigurations.description: The runtime log configuration for a managed thing.

SemanticVersion.description: The schema version. If this is left blank, it defaults to the latest version.

Items.description: The list of discovered devices that match the specified criteria.

NextToken.description: A token used for pagination of results when there are more discovered devices than can be returned in a single response.
A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.

ExecutionSummaries.description: A list of all of the over-the-air (OTA) task executions.

NextToken.description: A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.
A token that can be used to retrieve the next set of results.

tags.description: A set of key/value pairs that are used to manage the resource.
